title: PocketSMP (OFFICIAL)
description: The OFFICIAL modpack for the Cobblemon PocketSMP
body:
## ABOUT
This Minecraft modpack brings the world of Cobblemon to life, blending the excitement of Pokémon with the creativity of Minecraft. Explore new biomes, catch and train unique Cobblemon, and battle your way through challenging gyms and tournaments. With added features like custom quests, enhanced crafting systems, and new mobs, this modpack offers an expanded, immersive adventure. Whether you’re a Pokémon fan or a Minecraft enthusiast, embark on an epic journey to become the ultimate Cobblemon trainer!

## PERFORMANCE
designed to enhance your gaming experience by boosting performance without sacrificing visual quality. Featuring a collection of performance mods, it optimizes game speed, reduces lag, and improves frame rates, ensuring smooth gameplay even in large worlds. With mods like Optifine, Sodium, and others, you’ll enjoy faster load times, better resource management, and a more responsive Minecraft experience. Perfect for players who want to enjoy a seamless adventure, even on lower-end systems!
## MULTIPLAYER
perfect for both solo and multiplayer play. Whether you're playing locally with friends on a LAN or hosting your own server, the performance mods ensure a smooth experience for everyone. With reduced lag, faster load times, and improved game stability, you and your friends can explore, build, and adventure together without interruptions. Hosting on a server allows for easy collaboration and shared experiences, while local LAN play keeps things simple for casual, close-knit sessions. Enjoy seamless multiplayer action with enhanced performance no matter how you play!

## Use Code (SEBSTYN) For 25% OFF [BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/Sebstyn)
